issues.description: First effect trigger should be 'Activated' (correct) but actions are missing required condition: Rest action must target only {East Blue} type Characters. Current DSL lacks type filter.
Rest action missing type filter. Should restrict to {East Blue} Characters only, but target has no typeFilter specified.
KO action condition incomplete. Must target opponent's rested Characters with cost ≤3. Current DSL specifies maxCost but lacks 'mustBeRested' condition.
Second effect (Trigger with PlayFromHand) appears unrelated to card text. Official text contains no play ability—this effect should be removed or justified by full card text context.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] You may rest 1 of your {East Blue} type Characters: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 3 or less.
